_instructions.testimonials: Customer reviews. stars is 1–5. Keep quotes authentic and concise.
_instructions.quote: Customer quote shown in the card.
_instructions.variant: Testimonials visual variant key. Default: slider. Options: slider | cards | list | grid.

section_subtitle: Homeowners across Hampton Roads trust us with their outdoor projects.

testimonials.name: Jordan M.
testimonials.quote: Our new paver patio completely transformed the backyard. The crew was professional, on time, and left the site spotless.

testimonials.name: Alex R.
testimonials.quote: They rebuilt a failing wall and fixed the drainage issues we had for years. Solid work and clear communication.

testimonials.name: Sam T.
testimonials.quote: Beautiful stone fireplace and seating wall. Exactly what we wanted for outdoor entertaining.
